title: Claude Workflow Config
description: Project-specific configuration for the claude-workflow plugin. Every slash command reads this file to adapt to your stack.

project_name.description: Human-readable project name, used in journal headers and PR descriptions.

project_type.description: Determines which commands apply. /inspect only runs for 'web' projects.

commands.description: Shell commands for your stack's toolchain.

test.description: Run full test suite. E.g. pytest, npm test, cargo test

test_fail_fast.description: Run tests, stop on first failure. E.g. pytest -x

lint.description: Check lint errors. E.g. ruff check ., eslint .

lint_fix.description: Auto-fix lint errors. E.g. ruff check --fix ., eslint --fix .

format.description: Format code. E.g. ruff format ., prettier --write .

format_check.description: Check formatting without modifying. E.g. ruff format --check ., prettier --check .

import_check.description: Verify imports resolve. E.g. python -c "import app". Null to skip.

start.description: Start the app for browser testing. E.g. streamlit run app.py, npm run dev. Null for non-web projects.

source_dirs.description: Top-level source directories/files to scan. E.g. ["src/", "app.py"]

test_pattern.description: Test file naming convention. E.g. test_{module}.py, {module}.test.ts

config_dir.description: Centralized config directory. E.g. config/, src/config/

data_dir.description: Content/data directory (headless CMS pattern). Null if not used.

debug_dir.description: Directory for throwaway debug scripts, excluded from checks.

architecture.description: Optional. Define layers and import restrictions for /conform checks.

forbidden_imports.description: Packages that must not be imported in this layer.

centralized.description: If true, all state access goes through a single module.

module.description: The state management module. E.g. state.py, src/store.ts

registration_points.description: Multi-file registration requirements. E.g. adding a route requires updating router + config.

required_in.description: Files that must all be updated.

inspect.description: Browser inspection config. Only used when project_type is 'web'.

smoke_test.description: Human-readable description of how to smoke-test the app.

preflight.description: Extra settings for the /preflight quality gate.

secrets_patterns.description: Strings to scan for in source files. E.g. ["API_KEY", "TOKEN", "SECRET"]

secrets_files.description: Files that must be gitignored. E.g. [".streamlit/secrets.toml", ".env"]

planning_artifacts.description: Files that must not be committed. E.g. ["SPEC.md", "TODO.md", "TASKS.md"]

debug_file_patterns.description: Glob patterns for debug files. E.g. ["check_*.py", "debug_*.py"]

debug_code_patterns.description: Code patterns that indicate debug leftovers. E.g. ["breakpoint()", "console.log("]

dead_code_command.description: Command to find dead imports/variables. E.g. ruff check . --select F401,F841

scopes.description: Common scopes. Empty array means any scope is allowed.

folder_doc_names.description: Doc file names to check in each folder. E.g. ["README.md", "DESIGN.md"]

folders_to_check.description: Folders to audit for doc freshness.
